methodology.detection: regex on text field; case-sensitive (names are capitalized in source); compound aliases handled per-book
methodology.numeric_only_filter: Excludes prelude/part1-3/epilogue chapters from third-bucket and within-chapter analysis; included in all_beats_raw counts.
methodology.thirds_definition: Equal-thirds by 1-based chapter ordinal among numeric chapters.
methodology.tier_separation: primary = task-listed antagonists per book. secondary = supporting antagonists who share the arc (Errtu in Crystal Shard, Dendybar/Sydney/Bok in Streams of Silver). any_inclusive = primary OR secondary.
